title: I built a coding agent that gets 87% on benchmarks with a 4B parameter model, here's how
summary: I built a coding agent that gets 87% on benchmarks with a 4B parameter model, here's how
whyItMatters: I was frustrated that every coding agent (OpenCode, Cursor, Claude Code) assumes you're running GPT-5.4 or Claude Opus. If you try them with a local model like Gemma or Qwen they fall apart. I find that often tool calls fail, context overflows, multi-step tasks collapse. So I built SmallCode. It's designed from the ground up for small local models. **The re…
